summary: Deterministic rules-based seller-stage router with documented thresholds and golden boundary fixtures. Pure function classifySellerStage(profile) maps mock metrics to new | leakage | growth.

interfaceChanges.description: Rules-based seller lifecycle classifier consuming shop_age_days, order_count_30d, return_rate_30d, ad_spend_30d_vnd.

mappings.criterion: classifies new persona as new — one of three stages
routes low-volume sellers at threshold boundary
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_stage_router.test.ts::routes low-volume sellers as new even when return rate is elevated

mappings.criterion: returns the same stage for repeated calls with identical input
mappings.test: web/src/__tests__/test_seller_stage_router.test.ts::returns the same stage for repeated calls with identical input

mappings.criterion: runs without network or database dependencies
